⚙ API Endpoint Settings

Required when accessing from insynbio.com
Browsers block HTTPS pages from connecting to http://localhost.
You must expose your local API via an HTTPS tunnel and paste the URL here.

Step 1. Run ngrok http 8000 or cloudflared tunnel --url http://localhost:8000
Step 2. Copy the https://xxxx.ngrok-free.app URL
Step 3. Paste below and click Save

This URL is stored in your browser (localStorage) only. Share the ngrok URL with authorized testers separately.

Trial account

Username + numeric PIN (4–12 digits). New accounts receive 30,000 trial credits (~$300) and 10 complimentary AI assistant turns (.edu +20%). Email verification required for self-registration.

Scope · module
Service · step
Online: Select Scope first, then Service. Drag the horizontal/vertical dividers to adjust panel sizes. Offline corresponds to Advanced Offline Services only.

I am the InSynBio interpretation assistant: I explain terms and interpret computational reports. I do not provide any sequence, mutation, or redesign advice; use platform workflows for sequence-level work.
Brief (30 credits) · Detailed (120 credits) · first 10 turns free · Attach HTML report
AI interpretations are for reference only; official conclusions are based on reports. Attached reports are redacted before upload.
